featureSections.title: State-of-the-Art Diagnostic Technology
featureSections.body: We use the latest diagnostic tools to quickly and accurately identify issues with your vehicle, saving you time and money.
featureSections.cardBody: Our advanced scanners pinpoint problems in minutes.

featureSections.title: Complete Brake Repair and Safety Services

featureSections.cardBody: Quality parts and expert installation for lasting safety.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty Protection

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Repair?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online today. We’re here to keep you safely on the road.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, Advanced Auto Repair Services in Dallas, TX offers comprehensive auto care backed by decades of experience.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repair to restore performance and reliability.
services.longDescription: Our technicians use advanced scanning tools to pinpoint engine issues, from misfires to sensor failures. We perform everything from minor adjustments to complete engine overhauls, ensuring your vehicle runs smoothly.

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read trouble codes and live data.

process.title: Physical Inspection
process.description: Our mechanic inspects components like spark plugs, belts, and hoses for wear.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We perform the necessary repairs and test-drive your car to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics take about 1-2 hours, depending on the complexity of the issue.

faqs.question: Will you provide a cost estimate before starting work?
faqs.answer: Yes, we always provide a detailed estimate upfront before any repairs begin.

services.title: Brake System Service
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspections and repairs for safe, reliable stopping power.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your car’s most important safety feature. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels, then perform replacements or repairs using high-quality parts to ensure maximum stopping power.
benefits: Peace of mind on the road

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and fluid quality.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: Worn pads and rotors are replaced with premium-grade parts.

process.title: System Test
process.description: We test the brakes on the road to ensure proper function and pedal feel.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles, depending on driving habits and pad material.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM or aftermarket parts?
faqs.answer: We use quality aftermarket parts that meet or exceed OEM specifications, backed by a warranty.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine lubricated and clean with our professional oil change and fluid checks.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are vital for engine health. We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with the correct grade of oil. We also top off other essential fluids like coolant, transmission fluid, and brake fluid.

process.title: Drain & Filter
process.description: We drain the old oil and replace the oil filter.

process.title: Refill
process.description: Fresh oil is added to the manufacturer’s specification.

process.title: Fluid Check
process.description: We inspect and top off all other key fluids at no extra charge.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality conventional, synthetic blend, or full synthetic oil based on your vehicle’s requirements.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most vehicles need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, but check your owner’s manual for specifics.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with expert air conditioning and heating system service.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair issues with compressors, condensers, evaporators, and blower motors, restoring comfort to your vehicle’s interior.

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and airflow.

process.title: Leak Detection
process.description: Using UV dye and electronic detectors, we find and seal leaks.

process.title: Recharge & Test
process.description: We recharge the system with refrigerant and test cooling and heating performance.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a clogged condenser. We’ll diagnose exactly.

faqs.question: Do you repair heaters as well?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service both AC and heating systems, including heater cores and blower motors.

about.headline: Dallas’s Trusted Auto Repair Team
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our community safe and moving forward.
story: Advanced Auto Repair Services has been serving the Dallas community for over 25 years. Founded by master technician John Ramirez, our shop started as a small two-bay garage and has grown into a full-service facility thanks to our commitment to quality and integrity. We pride ourselves on treating every customer like a neighbor, offering transparent advice and fair pricing.

Today, our team of ASE-certified technicians handles everything from routine maintenance to complex engine repairs. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and ongoing training to ensure we can service modern vehicles effectively. Whether you drive a sedan, SUV, or truck, you can trust us to get the job done right the first time.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs and always explain your options.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every repair.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local events and strive to be a positive force in Dallas.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand behind our work with a solid warranty and friendly service.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Advanced Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Call us or stop by our Dallas shop. We’re ready to help with your auto repair needs.
